eula.content:
## End User License Agreement (EULA)
**Last updated:** 15 April 2026
This End User License Agreement (“Agreement”) is a legal agreement between you (“User”, “you”) and **AXT LIMITED**, also trading as **AXT** (“we”, “us”, or “our”), concerning your use of our software, games, and related services (the “Software”).
By installing, accessing, or using the Software, you agree to be bound by this Agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use the Software.
---
## 1. License Grant and Ownership
The Software is **licensed, not sold**.
AXT LIMITED grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to install and use one copy of the Software solely for your personal, non-commercial entertainment purposes, subject to compliance with this Agreement.
You acknowledge that:
- You receive a license to use the Software and do not obtain ownership of the Software. - Your access to online services may be suspended or terminated if you violate this Agreement or applicable platform rules. - You may not resell, rent, lease, sublicense, distribute, or transfer the Software except where expressly permitted by law.
---
## 2. Permitted Use and Content Creation
You may install and play the Software on your personal devices for personal entertainment purposes.
You are **expressly permitted** to create, publish, stream, and monetize videos, livestreams, reviews, screenshots, and other audiovisual content featuring the Software, including through platforms such as YouTube, Twitch, or similar services, provided that:
- The content does not misrepresent the Software or its creators; - The content does not promote or demonstrate cheating, hacking, or unauthorized modifications; - The content complies with this Agreement and applicable platform rules.
This permission is granted solely for content creation and does not transfer ownership of the Software or its intellectual property.
---
## 3. Prohibited Conduct
You may not:
- Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the Software; - Modify, tamper with, or bypass security, authentication, or DRM systems; - Use cheats, hacks, automation tools, bots, or exploits; - Disrupt multiplayer services or other users; - Use the Software for commercial purposes other than authorized content creation; - Circumvent Steam authentication or platform safeguards.
Violations may result in enforcement actions, including suspension or termination of access.
---
## 4. Intellectual Property Ownership
All rights, title, and interest in and to the Software are owned exclusively by **AXT LIMITED**.
This includes, without limitation:
- Source code and executable code; - Game design, mechanics, and systems; - Characters, factions, story, and lore; - Artwork, models, animations, sound effects, and music; - Trademarks, logos, and branding.
---
## 5. User-Generated Content
If the Software allows user-generated content (including mods, replays, or shared content), you retain ownership of your original contributions.
You grant AXT LIMITED a worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual license to host, display, distribute, and modify such content in connection with the Software.
We reserve the right to remove user-generated content at our discretion.
---
## 6. Online Services and Authentication
Certain features of the Software, including multiplayer functionality, require:
- An active internet connection; - Authentication through Steam; - Access to Unity Multiplayer Services.
You understand that:
- Online services may be modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time; - Access to online services may be restricted if you breach this Agreement; - Steam authentication is required to access online features.
Where technically feasible, single-player features may remain available even if online access is restricted.
---
## 7. Enforcement, Suspension, and Bans
AXT LIMITED reserves the right to enforce fair play standards and take appropriate action in response to violations of this Agreement.
Such actions may include:
- Temporary or permanent suspension from online services; - Multiplayer bans; - Termination of the license to use the Software.
Enforcement actions are applied in accordance with Steam policies, which determine whether revocation or restriction is permitted. No refunds are owed for enforcement actions resulting from violations.
---
## 8. Termination
This Agreement remains in effect until terminated.
It may terminate automatically if you breach its terms. Upon termination:
- Your license to use the Software ends immediately; - You must cease use and uninstall the Software; - Online functionality may be permanently inaccessible.
---
## 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
The Software is provided **“as is”** and **“as available”**, without warranties of any kind.
We make no guarantees regarding uninterrupted operation, error-free performance, or availability of online services.
---
## 10. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law:
- AXT LIMITED shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages; - Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the Software.
---
## 11. Privacy Policy
Your use of the Software is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is publicly available at:
**https://www.axt.co.nz/privacy**
---
## 12. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
This Agreement is governed by the laws of **New Zealand**, without regard to conflict of law principles.
Nothing in this Agreement limits consumer rights that cannot be waived under applicable international law.
---
## 13. Changes to This Agreement
We may update this Agreement from time to time. Continued use of the Software after changes have been posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Agreement.
---
## 14. Contact Information
**AXT LIMITED** Country of operation: New Zealand Email: contact@axt.co.nz
